source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two steady flows of air enter a control volume. One is a 0.025 kg/s flow at 350kPa, 150\circ\text{C}, state 1, and the other enters at 450 kPa, 15\circ\text{C}, state 2. A single flow exits at 100 kPa,−40\circ\text{C}, state 3. The control volume ejects 1 kW heat to the surroundings and produces 4 kW of power output. Neglect kinetic energies and determine the mass flow rate at state 2.
